allow: PowerShell($scripts = python -c "import sysconfig; print\(sysconfig.get_path\('scripts', scheme='nt_user'\)\)"; "$scripts"; Test-Path "$scripts\\uv.exe"; if \($env:Path -split ';' -contains $scripts\) { 'uv scripts dir on PATH' } else { 'NOT on PATH' })
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -m uv run python -m src.ingest)

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; python -m uv run python -c "from src.rag import hybrid_search; r=hybrid_search\('Apple revenue drivers fiscal 2025', top_k=5\); [print\(f'{x.score:.4f} {x.metadata[\\"company\\"]:5s} {x.chunk_id} {x.text[:120]}'\) for x in r]")
Bash(curl -sS -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"What was the weather in Tokyo last Tuesday?"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('intent:', d['intent']\); print\('confidence:', d['confidence']\); print\('answer:', d['answer'][:200]\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -m uv run python -m src.eval)
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -m uv run pytest tests/test_smoke.py -v)
Bash(curl -sS -m 90 -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"What were Apple main revenue drivers in fiscal 2025?"}')
Bash(curl -sS -m 90 -o e2e_response.json -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8000/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"What were Apple main revenue drivers in fiscal 2025?"}')
